description_long: This object is a pair of over-ear headphones with a coiled cable attached to one earcup. The headphones feature a padded headband and large, cushioned earcups designed to cover the ears completely, providing comfort and noise isolation. The exterior is primarily matte black with subtle green accents on the earcups, giving it a modern and professional appearance. The coiled cable is robust and flexible, likely terminating in a standard audio jack for connection to audio devices. The headband appears adjustable, with visible hinges or sliders for size customization. The overall build suggests durability and suitability for both personal and professional audio use in urban environments.
description: A pair of black over-ear headphones with a coiled cable and green accents, featuring cushioned earcups and an adjustable headband.
description_view_0: Front view showing both earcups, the padded headband, and the coiled cable extending downward.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the earcup and the profile of the headband, with the cable visible from the side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the earcups and the headband arch, with the coiled cable extending forward.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other earcup's profile and the full length of the coiled cable.
